docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL BY THE POST OFFICE. DEC 19 2023. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. (ENVELOPE MARKED RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $95. SERVED SEP-28-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE, PAULA
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY PEARSON, REBECCA GRACE, PAULA
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED RETURN WITHOUT ORIGNAL SUBPEONA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON APPEARED VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT PAULA GRACE APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRACE, PAULA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,170.00, DEFENDANT PREVENTED PLAINTIFF FROM PERFORMING DUTIES AS LISTING AGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO WENDY ANN WATKINS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PEARSON, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE, PAULA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2023 - JUDGMENT.
